response: I sent an English email invitation yesterday, offering two time options for them to choose which training session they would like to attend. Could you help me write an English email based on this background? Thank you for your reply yesterday. We will be holding the Compliance System Training on today at 6:00 PM and 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM on Teams. The training will be conducted in English. We hope you can attend on time. Thank you.
